keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 0, Nicaragua 1. Matias Moldskred (Nicaragua) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 0, Nicaragua 2. Óscar Acevedo (Nicaragua) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Ariagner Smith.
Henry Niño (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Dominican Republic 0, Nicaragua 2.
Second Half begins Dominican Republic 0, Nicaragua 2.
Miguel Rodríguez (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card.
